/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,olei_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.cpython-38-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/olei_interfaces/olei_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.cpython-38-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/olei_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/olei_interfaces/_olei_interfaces_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/grz/trolley_auto_drive_image/code/build/olei_interfaces/rosidl_generator_py/olei_interfaces:/home/grz/trolley_auto_drive_image/code/build/olei_interfaces:/opt/ros/foxy/lib: rosidl_generator_py/olei_interfaces/libolei_interfaces__python.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so libolei_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so libolei_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcpputils.so libolei_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so
